title: Formatting Dates
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a list of dates in a specific format (e.g., MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD). The dates should be separated by commas and enclosed in parentheses.
constraints: Must use the specified date format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated dates adhere to the word count and date format constraints.
Verify if the generated dates follow the specified date format.
Check if the generated dates are separated by commas and enclosed in parentheses.
